title: Biden, Trump campaigns clash over report the former president used the N-word
shortDescription: The Trump campaign called the allegation "completely fabricated" and designed to help Biden with Black voters.

title: Trump and allies reported 25,000-person turnout at Bronx rally | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump reposted several statements claiming there were 25,000 people in attendance, a figure repeated by his press secretary and the GOP.

title: Elon Musk says he has no plans to advise second Trump administration
shortDescription: Elon Musk denied reports that Donald Trump offered him a role in his potential second presidential administration.

title: Biden leads Trump in head to head race; trails in multicandidate field
shortDescription: Biden leads Trump among registered voters in a head-to-head race, but Trump leads Biden in a multi-candidate field.

title: Chief Justice Roberts stays clear of Alito's Trump recusal refusal
shortDescription: Supreme Court Chief Justice John Roberts declined Senate Democrats' request to meet to discuss ethics issues swirling around the court.

title: Biden will be virtually nominated early to make sure he's on Ohio's ballot
shortDescription: The DNC plans to nominate Joe Biden as its candidate for president with a virtual roll call to make sure he's on Ohio's general election ballot in time.

title: Ohio House passes Biden ballot fix, foreign campaign money bill
shortDescription: An effort to get President Joe Biden on Ohio's ballot has morphed into a fight over how to regulate ballot issue campaigns.

title: Post falsely claims old AOC video shows counter-rally to Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: The video in the post shows an October 2022 town hall hosted by Ocasio-Cortez, who held no public events on the day of Trump's rally in the Bronx.

title: Biden rallies for Black votes in Philadelphia
shortDescription: President Biden attacked Donald Trump during a campaign rally, calling him "unhinged" and reminding voters of his response to George Floyd protests.

title: No, Biden did not endorse surgery for transgender kids | Fact check
shortDescription: Joe Biden's remarks about discrimination faced by transgender people are being misrepresented by social media users.

title: Read the jury instructions in Trump's NY criminal hush money trial

title: Who is Nicole Shanahan? RFK Jr.'s VP pick looks to get on ballot in Maine
shortDescription: Nicole Shanahan, RFK Jr.'s vice presidential running mate, comes to Maine as the campaign tries to get on the state's ballot.

title: Biden appeals to Black voters attacking Trump's record on race
shortDescription: President Joe Biden attempted to shore up support among Black voters at a Philadelphia event Wednesday.

title: Trump has been tangled in thousands of lawsuits. This one is different.
shortDescription: Trump is polling ahead of Biden despite his legal battles - and he’s using the cases to help bolster fundraising in his reelection campaign.

title: Trump jury requests on trial transcript offer clues into deliberations
shortDescription: At the request of deliberating jurors, Judge Juan Merchan read jury instructions and portions of the transcript in Donald Trump's hush money trial.

shortDescription: What are the post-verdict strategies? Plus: Bird flu outbreaks, forecaster offers warnings as hurricane season begins. It's all on The Excerpt.

shortDescription: Iowa, Montana, New Jersey, New Mexico, South Dakota and DC will head to the polls in the upcoming primary elections.

title: Why Trump supporters are fuming over his hush money jury instructions
shortDescription: Here's why former President Donald Trump's supporters are complaining about the jury instructions in his New York criminal hush money trial.

title: Biden attempts to court Black voters in Philadelphia
shortDescription: President Joe Biden campaigned at an historic boarding school in Philadelphia as he began a new push to court Black voters in Pennsylvania.

title: How new Ohio Senate bill could change recreational marijuana law
shortDescription: A new Senate bill proposes long-discussed reforms to Ohio's recreational marijuana law and rules for delta-8 THC products.

title: Arizona GOP report urges indictment of AG who brought fake electors case
shortDescription: Impeachment, which could lead to removal from office after a trial in the Senate, is rare — and far from guaranteed given the slim GOP majorities.

title: Trump, Biden and aides anxiously await NY hush money verdict
shortDescription: As a New York jury deliberates for a second day, the Trump and Biden campaigns prepare post-verdict strategies.

title: No, this wasn't an OK for noncitizens to vote in US elections | Fact check
shortDescription: Fifty-two House Democrats joined with Republicans to pass a bill that would repeal a D.C. law allowing noncitizens to vote in local elections.
